message:
perf: lazy-load cardRegistry on Welcome page to reduce initial bundle (#9815)

The Welcome page eagerly imported cardRegistry (361K chunk) at module
scope just to display a card count in the hero stats. This pulled the
entire card registry into the Welcome chunk, slowing first paint for
the most common landing page.

Now the count loads asynchronously via dynamic import, keeping the
Welcome chunk lightweight while still showing the live card count
(with a brief placeholder while it resolves).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
